display_text: Hoodwink Aghanim's Scepter: Increases Sharpshooter's arrow speed and movement speed slow. This upgrade enhances Hoodwink's ability to counter mobile heroes and ensures more reliable initiation and follow-up damage in skirmishes.
search_text: Hoodwink Aghanim Scepter counter-mobility anti-kiting slow initiation skirmish reliability

display_text: Hoodwink Aghanim's Shard: Grants a new skill, Hunter’s Boomerang, which slows enemies and increases their vulnerability to spell damage. This upgrade transforms Hoodwink into a potent teamfight disruptor and spell damage amplifier, countering tanky and spell-resistant lineups.
search_text: Hoodwink Aghanim Shard spell damage amplification slow disruptor anti-tank teamfight
